title: Switcher
description: Use the gamemode switcher without operator permissions.
body:
# Switcher
Do you ever play on a server where you have /gamemode permissions but not operator permissions? For the vanilla gamemode switcher you need **operator permissions**, which means you can't use it and have to type "/gamemode ABC" all the time. This small **client-side** mod fixes this problem by **removing the permission check** when opening the gamemode switcher.

Requires **fabric**.
